National United Resources Holdings Limited ( (HK:0254) ) just unveiled an update.

National United Resources Holdings Limited announced the establishment of a joint venture (JV) focusing on cultural tourism, health, and new energy sectors. Pony AI Inc. ( (HK:2026) ) has issued an announcement.

Pony AI Inc. announced the conclusion of the stabilization period for its Global Offering on December 3, 2025, with Goldman Sachs (Asia) L.L.C. acting as the Stabilizing Manager. The stabilization actions included over-allocations of Class A Ordinary Shares and borrowing shares to cover these over-allocations. The over-allotment option was not exercised and has lapsed. The latest announcement is out from Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ).

Dashan Education Holdings Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Zhang Hongjun from his roles as Executive Director and Chairman, among other positions, effective December 1, 2025. The resignation is due to Mr. Zhang’s desire to focus on other commitments, and there were no disagreements with the Board. The company is actively seeking to fill the resulting vacancies to maintain compliance with regulatory requirements. Additionally, trading of the company’s shares has been temporarily halted pending a clarification announcement regarding a restriction notice related to the company’s shares.
